productDisplayName: Converse Men Casual Navy Blue Flip Flops
description: The classic flip flops has been dressed up by converse in a simple, understated and careless manner. Wear this pair with tonal denims and your favourite T-shirt to look casual without seeming overtly effortless. UpperCanvas upper with printed branding on the footbedCanvas mounted on rubber thong strapsFabric toe separator enclosed in transparent rubber casingOutsoleRubber outsole with waffle patterned lugs all overslipper careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
